```{=html}
<!-- when_all() - clean AND logic -->
<script>
window.WAL_TITLE_PRE = 'filter(when_all(';
// Two conditions for when_all
window.WAL_CONDS = [
  {
    label: 'Condition 1',
    text: 'species == "Gentoo"',
    color: '#4a86c5'
  },
  {
    label: 'Condition 2',
    text: 'body_mass_g > 5000',
    color: '#e8853a'
  }
];
window.WAL_TITLE_POST = '))';
window.WAL_DATA = [
  ['Adelie',    'Torgersen', '3750'],
  ['Adelie',    'Dream',     '3800'],
  ['Adelie',    'Biscoe',    '3250'],
  ['Adelie',    'Torgersen', 'NA'],
  ['Gentoo',    'Biscoe',    '4500'],
  ['Gentoo',    'Dream',     '5700'],
  ['Gentoo',    'Biscoe',    '4450'],
  ['Gentoo',    'Dream',     '5700'],
];
window.WAL_COLS = ['species', 'island', 'body_mass_g'];
// Which rows match which condition
window.WAL_MATCHES = [
  // Condition 1: species == "Gentoo"
  [false, false, false, false, true, true, true, true],
  // Condition 2: body_mass_g > 5000
  [false, false, false, false, false, true, false, true]
];
</script>
```

::: {.wal-stage-wrap}
<div id="wal-stage"></div>
:::

[]{.fragment .wal-frag id="wal-cond-1"}
[]{.fragment .wal-frag id="wal-cond-2"}
[]{.fragment .wal-frag id="wal-result"}
